name: Extensiv 3PL Warehouse Management API
what_it_does: Extensiv (formerly 3PL Central) cloud warehouse management system (WMS) REST API for third-party logistics providers and e-commerce fulfillment. Enables AI agents to manage inventory receiving and putaway for 3PL warehouse operations automation, handle order processing and pick-pack-ship workflow for fulfillment automation, access real-time inventory visibility and location tracking for warehouse management, retrieve multi-client inventory management for 3PL customer account isolation, manage carrier rate shopping and shipping label generation for parcel fulfillment, handle returns management and reverse logistics for e-commerce RMA processing, access billing management and 3PL customer invoice generation for warehousing billing automation, retrieve warehouse analytics and throughput reporting for operations intelligence, manage EDI transaction processing for retail compliance fulfillment, and integrate Extensiv with e-commerce platforms (Shopify, Amazon, Walmart), ERPs, and freight management systems.
use_cases: Managing inventory from warehouse operations agents
Generating shipping labels from carrier rating agents
not_for: Manufacturing WMS requiring production order integration
Simple dropshipping without physical warehouse operations
best_when: A third-party logistics provider (3PL), fulfillment center, or e-commerce brand managing warehouse operations wanting AI agents to automate order fulfillment, inventory management, carrier selection, returns processing, and 3PL client billing.
avoid_when: MULTI-CLIENT INVENTORY ISOLATION: Automated 3PL inventory management must maintain strict per-client inventory isolation; automated API queries without client ID filter can expose one client's inventory data to another client's automated workflow; implement client-scoped API contexts for all automated queries. HAZMAT SHIPPING COMPLIANCE: Automated shipping label generation for hazardous materials must apply DOT hazmat classification, packaging, marking, and label requirements; automated hazmat shipment without DOT compliance creates shipper criminal liability. RETAIL COMPLIANCE EDI ACCURACY: Automated EDI 856 ASN (Advance Ship Notice) for retail fulfillment must accurately reflect actual shipped contents; automated ASN with inaccurate case count or UPC data creates retail chargeback. Carrier rate shopping accuracy — automated carrier selection based on rate API quotes must account for surcharges, dimensional weight, and accessorial fees; automated carrier selection based only on base rate creates invoice surprise costs.

auth.notes: Extensiv uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. El Segundo, California HQ. Founded 2006 (as 3PL Central). Rebranded to Extensiv 2022. Private (FTV Capital PE). 3PL warehouse management market leader for US 3PLs. 1,500+ 3PL warehouse customers. E-commerce and omnichannel fulfillment focus. Competes with ShipHero, Logiwa, and Deposco for cloud WMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-warehouse or enterprise annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; warehouse tier and order volume-based pricing
pricing.notes: El Segundo CA. FTV Capital PE. Founded 2006, rebranded 2022. 1,500+ 3PL customers. E-commerce fulfillment focus. Per-warehouse annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; webhook throughput limits for high-volume fulfillment events; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: MULTI-CLIENT INVENTORY ISOLATION MANDATORY: Automated 3PL inventory queries must include client ID (CustomerID) filter on every API call; API queries without client ID filter return aggregate inventory across all 3PL clients; automated cross-client data exposure creates 3PL customer trust violation and potential contractual liability

HAZMAT SHIPPING DOT COMPLIANCE: Automated shipping label generation for hazardous materials must validate DOT hazmat classification, packing group, and proper shipping name; Extensiv does not automatically validate hazmat compliance; automated hazmat shipment without DOT validation creates shipper criminal liability

Retail ASN accuracy for chargebacks — automated EDI 856 ASN for retail fulfillment orders must reflect actual shipped contents including case count, UPC, and quantity; automated ASN generated before physical shipment completion can create chargeback on incorrect data

Carrier rate quote vs actual invoice gap — automated carrier selection based on Extensiv rate shop must account for fuel surcharge, residential delivery, and address correction fees not included in base rate; automated carrier selection on base rate alone creates invoice surprise

Webhook order event deduplication — Extensiv order fulfillment webhook events may redeliver on retry; implement idempotent order status processing with order ID deduplication to prevent duplicate fulfillment confirmation or billing events

Inventory reservation race condition — automated order allocation in high-volume e-commerce fulfillment can create inventory reservation race conditions where available inventory is over-allocated; implement inventory reservation with pessimistic lock or real-time available-to-promise check
agent_readiness.security_notes: 3PL WMS. SOC2. API key. US. Multi-client inventory and fulfillment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: 3PL WMS. SOC2. API key. US. Warehouse inventory and client fulfillment data.
